name: Ribbon Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz.) crushed pineapple in juice, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir 1 cup boiling water into each flavor of gelatin in separate medium bowls for at least 2 minutes until completely dissolved.
2. Stir 3/4 cup cold water into red gelatin. Pour into a 9 inch square pan. Refrigerate about 45 minutes or until set but not firm (gelatin should stick to finger when touched and should mound).
3. In a large bowl with wire whisk, stir lemon gelatin gradually into cream cheese until smooth. Stir in pineapple with juice. Refrigerate about 45 minutes or until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites).
4. Stir whipped topping and mayonnaise into the red gelatin layer in the pan. Refrigerate about 30 minutes or until set but not firm (gelatin should stick to finger when touched and should mound).
5. Stir remaining 3/4 cup cold water into lime gelatin. Refrigerate about 30 minutes or until slightly thickened (consistency of unbeaten egg whites). Spoon over lemon gelatin mixture in the pan.
6. Refrigerate for an additional 4 hours or until firm. Unmold and cut into squares. Garnish as desired. Makes 9 servings.
